title: How do You Make Sense of This
display_title: How do You Make Sense of This
wikitext:
[]: How do You Make Sense of This?             Quote Post by DAVEvangelion » Wed Dec 02, 2009 9:35 pm In the TV series, Shamshel is the 4th Angel to appear (obviously after Adam, Lilith, and Sachiel). It's the one that appears after Shinji gets wailed on by Toji. However, in You Are (Not) Alone Shamshel is CLEARLY identified as "The 5th Angel". Does this imply that the NGE timeline of events is different in the remakes than in the original series?

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Wed Dec 02, 2009 9:44 pm Rebuild spoiler: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Dec 02, 2009 9:46 pm DIDDY wrote: Rebuild spoiler: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by DAVEvangelion » Wed Dec 02, 2009 11:12 pm Sorry Diddy. I'm still new to the series and I have only seen up to 1.0 I feel dumb

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Wed Dec 02, 2009 11:23 pm Don't feel dumb, don't feel dumb; I haven't seen 2.0 either and I was just playing with you. If you want to read real spoilers go to the Rebuild of Evangelion section.

[]:             Quote Post by DAVEvangelion » Wed Dec 02, 2009 11:35 pm Thanks for the advice. I'm definitely going to try and get my hands on it as soon as it's available in the states.

[]:             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Thu Dec 03, 2009 12:41 am DIDDY wrote: Rebuild spoiler: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Thu Dec 03, 2009 12:43 am konfunoodle wrote: sorry but SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Dec 03, 2009 1:49 am Rebuild has a different story, thats why things are different

[]:             Quote Post by DAVEvangelion » Thu Dec 03, 2009 2:00 am Axell wrote: Rebuild has a different story, thats why things are different

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Thu Dec 03, 2009 2:07 am DAVEvangelion wrote: I'm still confused how rebuild relates to the original series...

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Thu Dec 03, 2009 7:37 am Yeah, Rebuild is the Do You Remember Love? of Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Dec 03, 2009 7:39 am DAVEvangelion wrote: So is the story of rebuild basically Anno doing NGE the way he would've done it back in the 90s if he had a bigger budget? I'm still confused how rebuild relates to the original series...

[]:             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Thu Dec 03, 2009 11:55 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: DAVEvangelion wrote: So is the story of rebuild basically Anno doing NGE the way he would've done it back in the 90s if he had a bigger budget? I'm still confused how rebuild relates to the original series...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Dec 03, 2009 1:06 pm SaltyJoe wrote: In b4 "It's fanfiction based on the original".

Article: How do You Make Sense of This
[]: How do You Make Sense of This?             Quote Post by DAVEvangelion » Wed Dec 02, 2009 9:35 pm In the TV series, Shamshel is the 4th Angel to appear (obviously after Adam, Lilith, and Sachiel). It's the one that appears after Shinji gets wailed on by Toji. However, in You Are (Not) Alone Shamshel is CLEARLY identified as "The 5th Angel". Does this imply that the NGE timeline of events is different in the remakes than in the original series?

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Wed Dec 02, 2009 9:44 pm Rebuild spoiler: SPOILER: Show
